extension.summary: Multi-Provider WireGuard VPN Manager (NordVPN, PIA, Custom)
extension.description: High-performance, hardened WireGuard VPN manager for LibreELEC. Now supports multiple providers including NordVPN (NordLynx), Private Internet Access (PIA), and Custom configurations. Features an automated Systemd watchdog to prevent connection drops.[CR][CR][B]Note:[/B] Designed specifically for LibreELEC. [CR][CR][B]Features:[/B][CR]• Multi-Provider Support (Nord, PIA, Custom)[CR]• Pure Python WireGuard Handshake logic[CR]• Smart Watchdog & Auto-Reconnect[CR]• Hardened DNS & IPv6 Leak Protection[CR][CR][B]Disclaimer:[/B] Not an official product of any VPN provider. Use at your own risk.
extension.news:
v1.4.4 (2026-05-28) - Added adjustable VPN server update intervals (0.5 to 7 days) via settings slider. - Added dynamic, context-aware update tracking based on the active provider mapping rules. - Fixed unnecessary background file-checks and notifications for providers with live-data setups (e.g., PIA).
v1.4.3 (2026-05-27) - Re-architected connection metadata sequence with prioritized multi-tier HTTPS fallback providers (Cloudflare, IPInfo, GeoJS). - Eliminated API-limit connection stashing bugs by introducing unthrottled direct text matrix lookups via Cloudflare. - Dropped connection setup loop delays to sub-millisecond ranges using strict native connection timeout constraints. - Streamlined interface setup routines by optimizing execution synchronization orders between secure DNS tables and lookup scripts. - Integrated automated system logging handlers to trace verified profile endpoints right as tunnels go live.
